THE TRIAL JUDGE, NOT A PRE-TRIAL JUDGE, IS IN A BETTER POSITION TO DECIDE THIS MOTION. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PROVIDE A FORM OF ORDER THAT TRACKS THE TENTATIVE RULING VERBATIM AND COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976.

Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion To Bifurcate Issues Of Liability And Damages At Trial [Code Of Civil Procedure Section 598]
Off Calendar May-06-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tenative ruling. DEFENDANTS BO LEE and CHAK LEE'S Motion To Bifurcate Issues Of Liability And Damages At Trial is denied without prejudice to re-filing a request for bifurcation to be decided by the trial judge. The trial judge, not a pre-trial judge, is in a better position to decide this motion. The prevailing party is to provide a form of order that tracks the tentative ruling verbatim and comply with CRC 3.1312.
